summary: Initial playthrough QA scaffold only; no full FPS route exists, but the first route should cover widened structural entries and weapon-footprint traversal.
observations: No playable FPS route, reward choice, or transition exists yet.
The foundation map now uses 5-tile structural entries for door-like breaks.
decisions: Playthrough QA must include combat, pause, death/recovery, objective, reward choice, and transition.
Player-facing breakage should be reported before polish.
risks: Smoke tests can pass while the actual combat and reward loop feels broken.
Door-like entries can still feel sticky if future props or enemies reduce usable width below the 5-tile structural-entry rule.
